name: Clear multi-city trip
input: Planning a 2-week trip to Japan in April. Want to spend 5 days in Tokyo exploring temples and trying street food, then take the bullet train to Kyoto for 4 days, and finish with 3 days in Osaka. Love hiking and food tours. Budget around $150/day.
notes: Complete information, specific destinations and duration

name: Vague dates
input: Thinking about Lisbon for a long weekend sometime next month. Love food markets and live music. Not into clubbing. Happy to meet other travelers for brunch.

name: Budget backpacker
input: 3-week budget backpacking trip through Southeast Asia. Starting in Bangkok, then maybe Chiang Mai, islands in Thailand, and Cambodia for Angkor Wat. Hostels only. Under $30/day.
notes: Clear budget tier, vague exact routing

name: Luxury trip
input: Booking a luxury resort stay in Maldives for our honeymoon. 7 nights, all-inclusive, overwater bungalow. Spa, snorkeling, romantic dinners. Budget is not a concern.

name: Solo hiker
input: Solo hiking trip to Patagonia in November. Want to do the W Trek in Torres del Paine. Planning about 10 days total including travel. Experienced hiker, comfortable camping. Budget-conscious but willing to pay for guided portions if needed.

name: European city break
input: Long weekend in Paris, April 15-18. Interested in art museums, photography, and good cafes. Mid-range budget, prefer Airbnb in Marais or Latin Quarter.
notes: Complete information, specific dates and neighborhood

name: Digital nomad
input: Looking for a place to work remotely for a month. Considering Bali, Chiang Mai, or Lisbon. Need good wifi and coworking spaces. Budget around $2000/month total. Want to meet other digital nomads, do some weekend trips, yoga.

name: Family trip
input: Taking kids to Disney World in Orlando for spring break. March 20-27. Staying on-site at a Disney resort. Want to do all the parks, maybe a day at the beach too. Looking for families with kids similar age (8 and 10) to meet up with.

name: Minimal information
input: Going somewhere warm for a week. Need a break.
notes: Extremely vague, should trigger many clarification questions

name: Contradictory preferences
input: Want to relax on a beach in Thailand but also do intense hiking and wake up early for sunrise adventures. Prefer luxury resorts but also want authentic local experiences and street food. Traveling solo but don't like being alone.
notes: Contains contradictions that should be flagged
